purpose: Phase implementation-group verdicts generated after grouped implementation batches. Use this as a bounded group-repair queue before the normal phase coverage gate.

repairPolicy.blockedMeans: explicit blocker/fallback decision exists; do not loop on this group before phase gate
repairPolicy.completeMeans: linked source/platform authority rows have enough behavior, parity, endpoint, and evidence data

requiredBehaviors: `buildHomeRoute` refreshes the repository-backed home state on each route render so the feed sections reflect current liked/search/filter state whenever the route is entered or updated.
`FoodikeBootstrap` stores home query/filter route state and `HomeStore.buildFilteredState(...)` rebuilds ads, categories, favourites, and restaurants from current repositories on each render.
`HomeStore` mirrors the state aggregation without any permission flow.
`buildHomeRoute` recomputes `HomeStore.buildFilteredState(...)` from repository data when the home route renders, preserving entry-time feed loading.

`HomeStore.loadAdvertisements()`, `loadRecommendedCategories()`, `loadFavouriteRestaurants()`, and `loadRestaurantCatalog()` now name the translated repository-backed state slices explicitly, while `buildVisibleState(...)` and `buildFilteredState(...)` pres...
`renderSearchBar` and `usesLocalSearchState()` keep only route-local query state without any preference persistence.

`renderSearchBar` feeds route-level query state into `HomeStore.buildFilteredState(...)` and `HistoryStore.buildVisibleState(...)`, enabling immediate home/history filtering from the shared search surface.
`buildHistoryRoute` reloads `HistoryStore.buildVisibleState(...)` on each route render so the current liked-restaurant state is reflected whenever the page is entered or updated.
`HistoryStore` plus `FoodikeBootstrap` route state expose observable search/tab state and reload the repository-backed favourites list on each rebuild.
`bootstrap_page.cj` keeps `homeSelectedFilter` in route state, and `buildFilterRow` re-renders selected styling while `HomeStore.buildFilteredState(...)` applies the active chip to visible lists.
`FoodikeBootstrap::buildHistoryRoute` binds current query/tab state and recomputes `HistoryStore.buildVisibleState(...)` whenever the history route is shown.
`HomeStore::toggleFilter(...)` and `matchesTag(...)` preserve the source chip-selection semantics by resolving the tapped filter string into the corresponding visible-list predicate.
`HomePageState` remains a pure translated state container with no permission path.
`HistoryPageState` and the route-local history state fields keep equivalent plain state for favourites, records, query, and tab selection without any permission handling.
acceptanceEvidence: Replace broad endpoints with precise target functions, types, resources, or tests before closing the group.
riskHints: current evidence uses broad shell/root/whole-file endpoints

groups.title: Platform capability: Media library and album discovery
reasons: media-library-access: not-applicable has notes explanation
requiredBehaviors: Detected 26 source artifact(s) with terms: file_ops, mediastore, gallery
Use a HarmonyOS media/photo library or picker capability when available; keep repository boundaries so mock data is not the final implementation.
Discover albums/media, filter image/video/GIF, sort, expose metadata needed by viewer/list screens, and report permission or empty-library states.
acceptanceEvidence: Record targetCapabilitySearch or structured API evidence, targetApiOrLibrary/targetStrategy when available, targetEndpoints, and tests or validation notes.
Direct platform status requires Cangjie-callable API, package, wrapper, FFI, or bridge evidence.
Fallback or deferred status requires a concrete blocker plus fallback/risk/future path.
Referenced tests must be covered by the latest accepted test gate or explicit verificationEvidence.

reasons: not-applicable has notes explanation

requiredBehaviors: `Advertisement.kt` only carries bundled ad image references and display metadata for cards; it does not implement zoom, gallery, or bitmap-processing behavior.
`Advertisement.kt` is a pure model type and does not request permissions or access protected APIs.
`FoodItem.kt` carries packaged image references for the recommended category strip only.
`FoodItem.kt` is a model type with no permission flow.
`Restaurant.kt` carries the packaged restaurant image used by cards and favourite strips; it does not implement viewer zoom or bitmap processing.
`Restaurant.kt` is a data model and does not own navigation, menus, toolbars, or tabs.
`Restaurant.kt` has no runtime permission behavior.

requiredBehaviors: `getCustomerInfo` converts rating counts into the source app's unusual threshold labels, returning `50+` for any count above 50 because of the original branch ordering.
`RestaurantCard.kt` renders a bundled restaurant image and rating star inside the card; it does not implement zoom, EXIF, or gallery behavior.
`RestaurantCard.kt` does not request runtime permissions.
`SearchBar.kt` provides local text-entry state that the surrounding home/history screens use for discovery filtering.
`SearchBar.kt` is text-only and contains no image-display behavior.
`SearchBar.kt` uses `remember { mutableStateOf("") }` so text entry updates the field immediately within the current composition.
`SearchBar.kt` has no permission request or protected API access.
`SearchBar.kt` stores only transient local query text, not settings or preferences.

requiredBehaviors: `HistoryViewModel.kt` exposes observable liked-restaurant state backed by repository collection and selection events.
`HistoryViewModel.kt` collects liked restaurants and writes a selected restaurant into the repository; it does not request permissions.
`HistoryViewModel.kt` loads liked restaurants at initialization and keeps the screen state in sync with repository updates.
`HistorySection.kt` renders static order-history cards with bundled veg/non-veg markers only; it does not implement gallery or zoom behavior.
`HistorySection.kt` has no permission request flow.
`History.kt` composes the search bar, tab row, and tab content inside the history route while participating in the shared shell navigation surface.
`History.kt` reads observable liked-restaurant state from `HistoryViewModel` and passes it into the tab content surface.
`History.kt` does not request permissions.
`History.kt` creates pager state and binds current liked-restaurant state when the screen enters composition.
`Tabs.kt` propagates pager-page selection between the tab row and the tab content surface.
`Tabs.kt` renders bold/current styling from the current pager page and updates that observable page state on click.
`Tabs.kt` has no permission flow.
`HistoryEvent.kt` defines only `SelectRestaurant`, which carries a restaurant payload plus an `onClick` callback; it does not model any permission request or permission result event.
`HistoryState.kt` is only a data holder for `likedRestaurantList`; it does not request permissions, handle permission results, or access protected APIs.
`FavouritesSection.kt` forwards the clicked liked restaurant into an `onClick` callback so the history favourites list can drive cross-screen navigation into restaurant detail.
`FavouritesSection.kt` only renders liked restaurants and forwards click callbacks; it does not request permissions or access protected APIs.
`TabsContent.kt` routes the shared `onClick` callback only into the favourites page, so favourite selection can cross from the tab content surface into restaurant detail navigation.
`TabsContent.kt` only switches between static history records and the favourites list; it does not request permissions or access protected APIs.

requiredBehaviors: `HomeScreen.kt` composes bundled ad, category, favourite, and restaurant-card imagery into the discovery feed without any gallery picker, EXIF processing, or zoom interaction.
`HomeScreen.kt` routes restaurant-card and favourite-strip selections into the detail screen by writing the selected restaurant and then navigating.
`HomeScreen.kt` composes the top profile affordance, content sections, and bottom-shell relationship used by the shared navigation surface.
`HomeScreen.kt` observes `HomeViewModel` state so ads, categories, favourites, and restaurants recompose immediately as backing data changes.
`HomeScreen.kt` does not request runtime permissions.
`HomeScreen.kt` reads view-model state on entry and updates system bars while composing the feed.
`HomeViewModel.kt` aggregates repository-backed ads, food items, restaurants, and liked restaurants into observable screen state.
`HomeViewModel.kt` aggregates repository state and does not request runtime permissions.
`HomeViewModel.kt` loads repository-backed lists during initialization so the home feed is ready when the screen appears.
`AdCard.kt` renders a bundled ad illustration inside the home carousel card.
`AdCard.kt` has no permission flow.
`FavouriteCard.kt` shows a packaged restaurant image in the favourites strip.
`FavouriteCard.kt` forwards favourite-card taps into the shared restaurant-selection and detail-navigation flow.
`FavouriteCard.kt` does not request permissions.
`RecommendedCard.kt` renders a packaged circular food image in the recommended row.
`RecommendedCard.kt` has no permission flow.
`ThankYouSection.kt` shows a packaged favourite icon in the footer.
`ThankYouSection.kt` has no permission flow.
`TopSection.kt` displays a packaged profile image and location icon in the home header.
`TopSection.kt` routes profile-avatar taps through the home header navigation surface.
acceptanceEvidence: Closed critical/high features must record sourceBehavior, targetBehavior, parityLevel, targetEndpoints, and verificationEvidence.
Build pass alone is not per-feature verification.
Referenced target tests need to be covered by the latest accepted test gate or explicit verificationEvidence.
Related platform capabilities must cite targetCapabilitySearch and a Cangjie-callable API, verified replacement, fallback blocker, or deferred blocker.
Replace root/shell/whole-file endpoints with precise target functions, types, resource files, or tests before closure.
riskHints: current-phase source features are still open
critical/high behavior cannot close on build pass alone
related platform capability must be resolved with Cangjie-callable API, replacement, fallback blocker, or deferred evidence
